sentences.text: Thank you for calling San Antonio housing authority this call may be recorded for quality assurance. Please listen to all of the following options. As our menu has changed our hours of operation are Monday through Friday eight AM to five PM for English please press one for Spanish please press two. If you are a current applicant or need housing assistance. Please press one. If you currently receive housing assistance and need information regarding your account please press two. If you are a current housing choice about your landlord or you are interested in becoming a landlord partner with San Antonio housing authority, please press three. If you are not sure what type of assistance you need and would like to speak with a customer service representative please press four. If you would like to report fraud and abuse please press five. If you wish to reach San Antonio housing. Authority so human resources department or other departments, please press nine to go to previous thank you for calling the San Antonio Housing Authority. If you know, your party's extension you may dial it at any time to reach any of our company departments press one for Darcy press two for D July press three for J Z press nine for the dial by name directory to repeat this menu press pound to return to the previous menu press Star. Thank you for calling the San Antonio Housing Authority. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at

any time to reach any of our company departments press one for Darcy press two for D July press three for J Z press nine for the dial by name directory to repeat this menu press pound. Please enter at least the first three letters of the person's last name for Q press seven. For Z press nine for the main menu press zero. I'm sorry, I cannot find any that match your entry. Please? Try again, please enter at least the first three letters of the person's last name for Q press seven. For Z press nine for the main menu press zero. Ronnie paniagua extension six six eight nine to select this extension press one to hear the next name press two to reach the Catherine Ramirez extension six two five one to select this extension press one to hear the next name press two to be real Bird over here is extension six one six zero to select this extension press one to hear the next name press two to review Gloria Ramirez extension six six nine one two for this extension press one to hear the next name press two to repeat the current name Veronica Ramirez extension six four eight three to select this extension press one to hear the next name press two to repeat the current name press three or to start your search over maisel Ramirez extension six three seven seven to select this extension press one to hear the next name Crystal Ramirez extension.

conversation.title: Call: Dither  Castro  and MaryAnn Santiago @ Beacon Communities
